taxonomy: × Laeliocattleya elegans is a hybrid orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a cross between a Laelia and a Cattleya, making it a part of the intergeneric hybrid group. The classification of × Laeliocattleya elegans is often used in orchid breeding and horticulture to identify specific hybrids. This classification is based on the characteristics and traits of the parent species, which are used to distinguish one hybrid from another. By understanding the classification of × Laeliocattleya elegans, growers and enthusiasts can better identify and cultivate this unique orchid species.
